description: render volcano + MA plots from a DESeq2 results CSV (read-only, matplotlib)
rules: read-only — reads a results CSV, writes only volcano_plot.png + ma_plot.png
results CSV must carry the standard DESeq2 columns: log2FoldChange, padj, baseMean
colours genes by padj < ALPHA; uses a headless (Agg) matplotlib backend
pure matplotlib + numpy + pandas — does not import pydeseq2
usage: Set RESULTS (a DESeq2 results CSV, e.g. the dea perk's deseq2_results.csv). Optional: ALPHA (default 0.05). Output: volcano_plot.png, ma_plot.png.
limitation: Visualization only. Requires matplotlib; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder and still passes.
